## Related Issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Infrastructure / configuration change

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's coding standards (`.github/copilot-instructions.md`)
- [ ] Spring Java Format applied (`./mvnw spring-javaformat:apply`)
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets
- [ ] No `System.out.println` — SLF4J logger used
- [ ] No commented-out code
- [ ] Unit or integration tests added/updated for changed behaviour
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`./mvnw test`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if usage, configuration, or API behaviour changed
- [ ] Backward compatibility preserved (or breaking change is intentional and documented)
